Home > Six Nations 2027

Six Nations 2027 Fixtures Guide

Ireland and England will kick off the 2027 Six Nations Championship under the lights at the Aviva Stadium in Dublin on Friday 5th February. The opening round continues on Saturday 6th February, with Scotland hosting Italy at Scottish Gas Murrayfield before France face Wales in Paris.

Six Nations 2027 Fixtures List

All kick-off times are GMT.

Round 1 | Round 2 | Round 3 | Round 4 | Round 5

ROUND 1

Friday 5th February 2027

Ireland v England Aviva Stadium, Dublin Kick-off: 8:10pm

Saturday 6th February 2027

Scotland v Italy Scottish Gas Murrayfield, Edinburgh Kick-off: 2:10pm
France v Wales Stade de France, Paris Kick-off: 4:40pm

ROUND 2

Saturday 13th February 2027

Italy v Ireland Stadio Olimpico, Rome Kick-off: 2:10pm
Scotland v Wales Scottish Gas Murrayfield, Edinburgh Kick-off: 4:40pm

Sunday 14th February 2027

England v France Allianz Stadium, Twickenham Kick-off: 3:10pm

ROUND 3

Saturday 20th February 2027

Wales v Ireland Principality Stadium, Cardiff Kick-off: 2:10pm
England v Italy Allianz Stadium, Twickenham Kick-off: 4:40pm

Sunday 21st February 2027

France v Scotland Stade de France, Paris Kick-off: 3:10pm

ROUND 4

Friday 5th March 2027

Scotland v Ireland Scottish Gas Murrayfield, Edinburgh Kick-off: 8:10pm

Saturday 6th March 2027

Italy v France Stadio Olimpico, Rome Kick-off: 2:10pm
Wales v England Principality Stadium, Cardiff Kick-off: 4:40pm

ROUND 5

Saturday 13th March 2027

Italy v Wales Stadio Olimpico, Rome Kick-off: 2:10pm
England v Scotland Allianz Stadium, Twickenham Kick-off: 4:40pm
Ireland v France Aviva Stadium, Dublin Kick-off: 8:10pm

For information about Six Nations rugby tickets and where to purchase them, please read our guide here: How to buy Six Nations rugby tickets.

2027 Six Nations fixtures confirmed as Ireland host England in Friday night opener

9th March 2026
